scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix lib/api-zod && npm install --prefix lib/db && npm install --prefix lib/api-client-react && npm install --prefix artifacts/api-server && npm install --prefix artifacts/code-analyzer
scripts.dev: concurrently "cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ npm run dev --prefix artifacts/code-analyzer" "cross-env PORT=3001 npm start --prefix artifacts/api-server"
scripts.build: npm --prefix artifacts/api-server run build && npm --prefix artifacts/code-analyzer run build
